title: Watch: Fire erupts again at Fujairah port in UAE, harbour suspends oil loadings
summary_full: Fujairah port in the UAE experienced a drone attack, igniting a fire at a petroleum facility. While emergency teams quickly contained the blaze with no reported injuries, oil loadings were suspended. This marks a recent escalation in attacks on the vital oil hub, underscoring regional tensions and the port's critical role in global energy trade.
